bodies:
Stijl begint bij de details. Ontdek de kracht van echte natuursteen en geef je outfit karakter.
Kies jouw favorieten en bundel voor extra voordeel.

Meer armbanden. Minder betalen.
Kies je bundel en profiteer van tot 15% korting.

Jij kent Stoney al. Nu is het moment om je collectie uit te breiden.
Bundel je favorieten en profiteer van extra voordeel.

Het perfecte cadeau hoeft niet moeilijk te zijn.
Kies een bundel, laat hem luxe verpakken en verras met betekenis.

Deze bundels vliegen over de toonbank.
Populaire designs, tijdelijk met bundelkorting en gratis verzending.

images.description: A 3x3 grid of nine white-background product photos displays beaded bracelets in varying blue and gray tones, each featuring a small dark square charm engraved with the letters "SB"; the top row shows single bracelets, the middle row shows two-bracelet stacks, and the bottom row shows three-bracelet stacks. The background of the overall image transitions from dark gray at the top to light blue-gray at the bottom. Below the grid, visible text reads "STONEY bracelets," followed by "More Bracelet, Less Cost" in large black serif type, "Bundle our best selling pieces." in smaller text, and a tan oval badge reading "SAVE UP TO 15% - FREE SHIPPING WHEN BUYING AS A BUNDLE."

A 3×3 grid of white-background product images displays beaded bracelets in blue and grey/dark tones, each featuring a small square metal charm engraved with "SB"; the top row shows single bracelets, the middle row shows two-bracelet stacks, and the bottom row shows three-bracelet stacks. The background of the overall image transitions from dark grey at the top to light grey-blue at the bottom. Below the grid, visible text reads "STONEY bracelets," "More Bracelet, Less Cost," "Bundle our best selling pieces," and "SAVE UP TO 15% - FREE SHIPPING WHEN BUYING AS A BUNDLE" within an olive-toned pill-shaped button.
